coupling_rules.name: neck_pitch_roll
coupling_rules.description: Servos 2 and 3 share pitch, with asymmetric roll handled by moving only one side for tilt.
notes: Servo 2 raw+ with servo 3 raw- means head up.
Positive semantic roll is treated as tilt right using servo 2 only.
Negative semantic roll is treated as tilt left using servo 3 only.

coupling_rules.name: mirrored_eyelids
coupling_rules.description: Left and right lid raw directions differ, so semantic open/close must be compiled per joint.

coupling_rules.name: eyes_follow_lids
coupling_rules.description: Strong eye pitch should pull the upper lids slightly in the same semantic direction.

coupling_rules.name: mirrored_brows
coupling_rules.description: Brows are symmetric semantically but use opposite raw directions on the right side.

notes: Current product shape is an expressive social bust/head with no powered base assumptions.
Servo IDs and raw limits are isolated here so the brain only speaks in semantic embodiment commands.
Lane 1 keeps virtual preview authoritative and reserves live writes for explicit operator-gated calibration flows.
pending_bench_confirmations: Confirm neutral alignment at raw 2047 for all 11 servos on the assembled head.
Confirm mirrored eyelid and brow directions on powered hardware.
Confirm safe speed and acceleration limits once external power is available.
